prompt: Move Ethernet host device installation out of IFNET import path
note: Introduced Ethernet device installation state under src/ETHERNET/device.py and moved runtime interface snapshot assembly into IFNET via src/IFNET/interfaces.py. DPlane host-interface import commands now install/uninstall Ethernet devices, formal src paths consume IFNET interface snapshots instead of IFNET import state, and IFNET/imports.py remains only as a compatibility facade during migration.
